name: Jimmy Dean Easter Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the sausage, onions, and bell peppers in a heavy skillet.
2. Drain the mixture.
3. Line a baking dish with three-quarters of the sausage mixture.
4. Combine the eggs and sour cream and season to taste.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the sausage in the baking dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees until the eggs are semi-set.
7. Stir the egg mixture and top with the remaining sausage.
8. Bake until the eggs are firm.
Serves 4 to 6.
